name: Entity-gated sports (WP-92): chess/esports need a sport-scoped tracked-entity match — no wholesale, no norwegian/ai-research blanket
description: WP-92 removed chess and esports from the DEFAULT followBroadly (this vector omits followBroadly on purpose, so the default applies). For an entity-gated sport a tracked-entity match is the ONLY way onto the board: the norwegian / favorite / importance / ai-research shortcuts do NOT apply. So a minor Norwegian chess open with a lone club player drops (chess-open-norsk — the live 'XXVI Obert Internacional Sant Martí' class), a chess event mentioning the CITY that shares a name with a tracked FOOTBALL club drops because the match is sport-scoped (chess-barcelona — the football club 'Barcelona' cannot admit a chess event), and a CS2 match between two untracked teams drops even when it is source:'ai-research' (cs2-airesearch-other). Only events that name a tracked chess/esports entity stay: Magnus Carlsen (chess-carlsen), 100 Thieves (cs2-100t), and Håvard «rain» Nygaard (cs2-nygaard) — and those three also ring the bell (mustWatch), since athletes and teams notify by default. mustSee follows its own client rules and is not asserted here.
